title: Source node
description: Where evidence came from, when it was retrieved, and how it was accessed (A1.3). retrieved_at and access are required so the stale-evidence release gate is decidable. Carried in a source.added event under payload.node. TOLERANT v0 draft: additionalProperties is permissive; the access enum stays.

id.description: Node ID embedding the artifact ID, e.g. source:association-board-brief-001:s003.

retrieved_at.description: When the source text was retrieved. Feeds the artifact freshness policy checked by pgf check (Phase 2).

uri.description: Optional locator. Not required and not fetched by the CLI.

content_digest.description: Optional SHA-256 of the retrieved text snapshot. A convenience for change detection, not an integrity control (D2).

snapshot_ref.description: Optional path to a stored excerpt/snapshot within the artifact directory.
